_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop risk mitigation strategies to ensure enumerated risks are prioritized, mitigated, shared, transferred, and/or accepted.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifying processing activities that present high risk to individuals, and recommending proportionate technical and organizational measures to mitigate identified risks.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-008 (RM, cosine: 0.502), AG-K-010 (AG, cosine: 0.501).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.535). Shared vocabulary: [risk, risks]. DCWF-only terms [accepted, develop, ensure, enumerated, mitigated, mitigation] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, assessments, conducting, data, high, identified] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.862, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 29-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Develop risk mitigation strategies to ensure enumerated risks are prioritized, m" and "Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifyin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.568 ≈ STS 0.535 (gap 0.032). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [risk, risks] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [risk, risks]. DCWF-only: [accepted, develop, ensure, enumerated, mitigated, mitigation]. WIDAI-only: [activities, assessments, conducting, data, high, identified].
